ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track on the music streaming platform */,
  "track_href" TEXT /* URL for the track on the music streaming platform */,
  "analysis_url" TEXT /* URL for the audio analysis of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) for the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Is the track explicit? */,
  "preview_url" TEXT /* Preview URL of the track */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., album, single, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_type" TEXT /* Type of artist (e.g., solo, group, etc.) */,
  "artist_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist */,
  "artist_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "artist_genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_tracks" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "artist_role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the track (e.g., lead, featured, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_parent_id" INTEGER /* Parent genre ID (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tracks" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user played the track */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user skipped the track */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "add_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "added_at" (
  "added_at_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each added_at entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("added_at_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_added_at_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moods" (
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mood */,
  "mood_name" TEXT /* Name of the mood */,
  "mood_description" TEXT /* Description of the mood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_moods" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_styles" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "artist_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first artist */,
  "artist_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second artist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track featuring the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_artist_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id2") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_artist_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id1") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
